entity.summary: United Kingdom-origin centralized cryptocurrency exchange launched in 2013 and still operating globally, with CEX.IO Markets UK Limited obtaining UK FCA money-laundering-regulations registration in March 2026.
entity.notes: The March 2026 event is recorded specifically as FCA registration under the UK Money Laundering Regulations for CEX.IO Markets UK Limited, not as unrestricted FCA authorisation of every global CEX.IO product. The 2013 launch remains a year-level marker.

expected.summary: United Kingdom-based centralized exchange launched in 2013 and still operating under the CEX.IO brand.

changes.summary: United Kingdom-origin centralized cryptocurrency exchange launched in 2013 and still operating globally, with CEX.IO Markets UK Limited obtaining UK FCA money-laundering-regulations registration in March 2026.
changes.notes: The March 2026 event is recorded specifically as FCA registration under the UK Money Laundering Regulations for CEX.IO Markets UK Limited, not as unrestricted FCA authorisation of every global CEX.IO product. The 2013 launch remains a year-level marker.

events.title: CEX.IO debuted as an exchange in 2013
events.description: CEX.IO's official company timeline records that the platform debuted as a cryptocurrency exchange in 2013 alongside the GHash.IO mining pool.
events.notes: The official timeline establishes the year but not an exact launch day, so January 1 is used as a year-level marker.

events.title: CEX.IO Markets UK Limited secured FCA MLR registration
events.description: CEX.IO announced that CEX.IO Markets UK Limited had obtained registration with the UK Financial Conduct Authority under the Money Laundering Regulations.
events.notes: The event is entity-specific and should not be read as full FCA authorisation for every CEX.IO service or jurisdiction.

evidence.title: CEX.IO About Us and company timeline
evidence.notes: The official timeline states that CEX.IO debuted as an exchange in 2013.

evidence.title: CEX.IO secures FCA registration in the UK
evidence.notes: The official announcement identifies CEX.IO Markets UK Limited and the registration under the UK Money Laundering Regulations.

evidence.title: CEX.IO official exchange
evidence.notes: The official domain verifies current exchange, wallet, card-purchase, spot, margin, and related services.

evidence.title: CEX.IO legal and regulatory information
evidence.notes: The official legal page provides jurisdiction-specific entity and registration information used to limit the scope of regulatory claims.
